steps.title: Pin down the goal
steps.content: The student wants to "explain the origin of the species' name." The answer must say what Mansourasaurus is named after, not just mention the discovery.

steps.title: Find the relevant note
steps.content: The last two bullets give the source: the team is from Mansoura University, and the species was named to recognize that team. So a complete explanation of the name must link "Mansourasaurus" to Mansoura University.

steps.title: Eliminate per choice
steps.content:
• Choice A — 'a new species discovered in Egypt in 2013, lived approximately 80 million years ago': gives discovery year and age but says nothing about where the name comes from. ✗
  • Choice B — 'A partial dinosaur skeleton found in Egypt's Dakhla Oasis belonged to a species named Mansourasaurus': states the name but never explains its origin. ✗
  • Choice C — 'discovered in 2013 by Egyptian paleontologist Hesham Sallam and a team of university students': identifies the discoverers but never connects the name to them or to Mansoura University. ✗
  • Choice D — 'named Mansourasaurus to recognize the team that discovered it, a professor and students from Mansoura University': explicitly ties the name to Mansoura University — the origin of the name. ✓
That matches choice D — D is correct.
